question: List all products in the Northwind database.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?product WHERE { ?product a nw:Product . }

question: List all customers.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?customer WHERE { ?customer a nw:Customer . }

question: List all orders.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?order WHERE { ?order a nw:Order . }

question: List all employees.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?employee WHERE { ?employee a nw:Employee . }

question: List all categories.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?category WHERE { ?category a nw:Category . }

question: List all customers located in Germany.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?customer WHERE { ?customer a nw:Customer ; nw:country "Germany" . }

question: List all suppliers from the USA.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?supplier WHERE { ?supplier a nw:Supplier ; nw:country "USA" . }

question: List all territories in the Eastern region.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?territory WHERE { ?territory a nw:Territory ; nw:inRegion nw:region_1 . }

question: List all shippers.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipper WHERE { ?shipper a nw:Shipper . }

question: List all discontinued products.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?product WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:discontinued "true"^^xsd:boolean . }

question: What is the contact name for customer ALFKI?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?name WHERE { nw:customer_ALFKI nw:contactName ?name . }

question: Which category does the product Chai belong to?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName WHERE { nw:product_1 nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . }

question: What is the unit price of Chang?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?price WHERE { nw:product_2 nw:productUnitPrice ?price . }

question: What is the company name of supplier 1?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?name WHERE { nw:supplier_1 nw:companyName ?name . }

question: What is the job title of employee Nancy Davolio?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?title WHERE { nw:employee_1 nw:title ?title . }

question: What is the freight cost for order 10643?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?freight WHERE { nw:order_10643 nw:freight ?freight . }

question: What city does customer BERGS reside in?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?city WHERE { nw:customer_BERGS nw:city ?city . }

question: What is the description of the Beverages category?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?desc WHERE { nw:category_1 nw:description ?desc . }

question: What is the phone number of the shipper Speedy Express?

question: What is the hire date of employee Andrew Fuller?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?hireDate WHERE { nw:employee_2 nw:hireDate ?hireDate . }

question: Which employee handled order 10643?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?empName WHERE { nw:order_10643 nw:handledBy ?emp . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn . ?emp nw:lastName ?ln . BIND(CONCAT(?fn, " ", ?ln) AS ?empName) }

question: What products does supplier Exotic Liquids supply?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product nw:suppliedBy nw:supplier_1 ; nw:productName ?prodName . }

question: Which customer placed order 10278?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName WHERE { nw:order_10278 nw:placedBy ?cust . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . }

question: Which shipper delivered order 10444?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipperName WHERE { nw:order_10444 nw:shippedBy ?shipper . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . }

question: List all products in the Condiments category.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory nw:category_2 ; nw:productName ?prodName . }

question: Which products are included in order line ol_10643_1?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { nw:ol_10643_1 nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName . }

question: Which employees have Janet Leverling as their manager?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?emp nw:reportsTo nw:employee_3 . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . }

question: List all orders handled by employee Nancy Davolio.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy nw:employee_1 ; nw:orderID ?orderID . }

question: What products are in the Confections category?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory nw:category_3 ; nw:productName ?prodName . }

question: Which orders were shipped by Speedy Express?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID WHERE { ?order nw:shippedBy nw:shipper_1 ; nw:orderID ?orderID . }

question: Who are the direct reports of Andrew Fuller?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?emp nw:reportsTo nw:employee_2 . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . }

question: List the products ordered by customer ALFKI.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?prodName WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy nw:customer_ALFKI ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName . }

question: Which region does employee Nancy Davolio serve through her territories?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?regionDesc WHERE { nw:employee_1 nw:servesTerritory ?terr . ?terr nw:inRegion ?region . ?region nw:regionDescription ?regionDesc . }

question: Which suppliers provide products that appear in order 10643?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?suppName WHERE { nw:order_10643 nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . }

question: Which categories of products has customer BERGS ordered?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?catName WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy nw:customer_BERGS ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . }

question: Which customers have ordered products supplied by Exotic Liquids?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?compName WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:suppliedBy nw:supplier_1 . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . }

question: Which shippers have delivered orders containing Chai?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?shipperName WHERE { ?order nw:hasOrderLine ?ol ; nw:shippedBy ?shipper . ?ol nw:includesProduct nw:product_1 . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . }

question: Which employees handled orders for customer Ernst Handel?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy nw:customer_ERNSH ; nw:handledBy ?emp . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . }

question: List the category names for products in order 10258.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?catName WHERE { nw:order_10258 nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . }

question: Which regions do territories served by Janet Leverling belong to?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?regionDesc WHERE { nw:employee_3 nw:servesTerritory ?terr . ?terr nw:inRegion ?region . ?region nw:regionDescription ?regionDesc . }

question: Which customers ordered products from the category Beverages, and which shipper delivered those orders?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?compName ?shipperName WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol ; nw:shippedBy ?shipper . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:belongsToCategory nw:category_1 . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . }

question: Which supplier provides the product included in order line ol_10290_1?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?suppName WHERE { nw:ol_10290_1 nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . }

question: What is the company name of the customer whose order was handled by Andrew Fuller and shipped by Speedy Express?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy nw:employee_2 ; nw:shippedBy nw:shipper_1 ; nw:placedBy ?cust . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . }

question: Which employees handle orders that contain the product Northwoods Cranberry Sauce?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?order nw:hasOrderLine ?ol ; nw:handledBy ?emp . ?ol nw:includesProduct nw:product_8 . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . }

question: List the product names and their suppliers for all order lines in order 10278.
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName ?suppName WHERE { nw:order_10278 nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . }

question: Which territory descriptions correspond to the regions served by employees who handled orders for COMMI?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT DISTINCT ?terrDesc WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy nw:customer_COMMI ; nw:handledBy ?emp . ?emp nw:servesTerritory ?terr . ?terr nw:territoryDescription ?terrDesc . }

question: How many orders has each customer placed?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName

question: How many products are in each category?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName (COUNT(?product) AS ?prodCount) WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . } GROUP BY ?catName

question: What is the average freight cost per shipper?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipperName (AVG(?freight) AS ?avgFreight) WHERE { ?order nw:shippedBy ?shipper ; nw:freight ?freight . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . } GROUP BY ?shipperName

question: How many order lines does each order have?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID (COUNT(?ol) AS ?lineCount) WHERE { ?order nw:orderID ?orderID ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . } GROUP BY ?orderID

question: What is the total quantity ordered for each product?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty) WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod ; nw:quantity ?qty . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName . } GROUP BY ?prodName

question: How many orders has each employee handled?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy ?emp . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . } GROUP BY ?fn ?ln

question: What is the total freight cost for all orders placed by each customer?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (SUM(?freight) AS ?totalFreight) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:freight ?freight . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName

question: How many products does each supplier provide?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?suppName (COUNT(?product) AS ?prodCount) WHERE { ?product nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . } GROUP BY ?suppName

question: What is the average unit price of products per category?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName (AVG(?price) AS ?avgPrice) WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory ?cat ; nw:productUnitPrice ?price . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . } GROUP BY ?catName

question: How many territories does each employee serve?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln (COUNT(?terr) AS ?terrCount) WHERE { ?emp nw:servesTerritory ?terr . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . } GROUP BY ?fn ?ln

question: What is the total number of units in stock for each category?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName (SUM(?stock) AS ?totalStock) WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory ?cat ; nw:unitsInStock ?stock . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . } GROUP BY ?catName

question: How many orders were shipped by each shipper?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipperName (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:shippedBy ?shipper . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . } GROUP BY ?shipperName

question: What is the average discount applied across all order lines for each product?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName (AVG(?disc) AS ?avgDiscount) WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod ; nw:discount ?disc . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName . } GROUP BY ?prodName

question: How many distinct products has each customer ordered?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?prod) AS ?distinctProducts) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName

question: What is the total number of order lines per employee?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln (COUNT(?ol) AS ?totalLines) WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy ?emp ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . } GROUP BY ?fn ?ln

question: Which products have units in stock below their reorder level?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName ?stock ?reorder WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:unitsInStock ?stock ; nw:reorderLevel ?reorder . FILTER(?stock < ?reorder) }

question: Which products are not discontinued?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:discontinued "false"^^xsd:boolean . }

question: Which orders have a freight cost greater than 50?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID ?freight WHERE { ?order a nw:Order ; nw:orderID ?orderID ; nw:freight ?freight . FILTER(?freight > 50) }

question: Which products have a unit price between 15 and 25?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName ?price WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:productUnitPrice ?price . FILTER(?price >= 15 && ?price <= 25) }

question: Which orders do not have a shipped date yet?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID WHERE { ?order a nw:Order ; nw:orderID ?orderID . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?order nw:shippedDate ?sd . } }

question: Which customers are not located in Germany?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName ?country WHERE { ?cust a nw:Customer ; nw:companyName ?compName ; nw:country ?country . FILTER(?country != "Germany") }

question: Which order lines have a discount greater than zero?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?ol ?disc WHERE { ?ol a nw:OrderLine ; nw:discount ?disc . FILTER(?disc > 0) }

question: Which employees were hired after 1992-05-01?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?fn ?ln ?hireDate WHERE { ?emp a nw:Employee ; nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln ; nw:hireDate ?hireDate . FILTER(?hireDate > "1992-05-01T00:00:00"^^xsd:dateTime) }

question: Which products have zero units on order?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:unitsOnOrder ?uoo . FILTER(?uoo = 0) }

question: Which products have units in stock and are not discontinued?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?prodName ?stock WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:unitsInStock ?stock ; nw:discontinued "false"^^xsd:boolean . FILTER(?stock > 0) }

question: Which customers have placed more than one order?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName HAVING (COUNT(?order) > 1)

question: Which categories have an average product price above 20?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName (AVG(?price) AS ?avgPrice) WHERE { ?product nw:belongsToCategory ?cat ; nw:productUnitPrice ?price . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . } GROUP BY ?catName HAVING (AVG(?price) > 20)

question: Which employees have handled more than 2 orders?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy ?emp . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . } GROUP BY ?fn ?ln HAVING (COUNT(?order) > 2)

question: Which shippers have shipped more than 2 orders?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipperName (COUNT(?order) AS ?orderCount) WHERE { ?order nw:shippedBy ?shipper . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . } GROUP BY ?shipperName HAVING (COUNT(?order) > 2)

question: Which products appear in more than 2 order lines?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName (COUNT(?ol) AS ?lineCount) WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName . } GROUP BY ?prodName HAVING (COUNT(?ol) > 2)

question: Which suppliers supply more than 3 products?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?suppName (COUNT(?product) AS ?prodCount) WHERE { ?product nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . } GROUP BY ?suppName HAVING (COUNT(?product) > 3)

question: Which customers have a total freight cost exceeding 100?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (SUM(?freight) AS ?totalFreight) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:freight ?freight . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName HAVING (SUM(?freight) > 100)

question: Which orders have more than 2 order lines?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID (COUNT(?ol) AS ?lineCount) WHERE { ?order nw:orderID ?orderID ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . } GROUP BY ?orderID HAVING (COUNT(?ol) > 2)

question: What is the total revenue per category (quantity times unit price across all order lines)?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?catName (SUM(?qty * ?price) AS ?totalRevenue) WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod ; nw:quantity ?qty ; nw:olUnitPrice ?price . ?prod nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?cat nw:categoryName ?catName . } GROUP BY ?catName

question: What is the average discount by supplier across all order lines?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?suppName (AVG(?disc) AS ?avgDiscount) WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod ; nw:discount ?disc . ?prod nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?supp nw:companyName ?suppName . } GROUP BY ?suppName

question: What is the total quantity of products ordered per customer?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:quantity ?qty . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName

question: How many distinct suppliers have provided products ordered by each customer?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?supp) AS ?supplierCount) WHERE { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:suppliedBy ?supp . ?cust nw:companyName ?compName . } GROUP BY ?compName

question: What is the total revenue handled by each employee?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln (SUM(?qty * ?price) AS ?totalRevenue) WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy ?emp ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:quantity ?qty ; nw:olUnitPrice ?price . ?emp nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . } GROUP BY ?fn ?ln

question: What is the average order line quantity per region?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?regionDesc (AVG(?qty) AS ?avgQty) WHERE { ?order nw:handledBy ?emp ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:quantity ?qty . ?emp nw:servesTerritory ?terr . ?terr nw:inRegion ?region . ?region nw:regionDescription ?regionDesc . } GROUP BY ?regionDesc

question: How many distinct categories of products has each shipper delivered?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?shipperName (COUNT(DISTINCT ?cat) AS ?catCount) WHERE { ?order nw:shippedBy ?shipper ; nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod . ?prod nw:belongsToCategory ?cat . ?shipper nw:companyName ?shipperName . } GROUP BY ?shipperName

question: Which products have never been ordered?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?prodName WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?product . } }

question: Which employees are not assigned to any territory?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?emp a nw:Employee ; nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?emp nw:servesTerritory ?terr . } }

question: Which customers have never placed an order?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?compName WHERE { ?cust a nw:Customer ; nw:companyName ?compName . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?order nw:placedBy ?cust . } }

question: Which employees do not report to any manager?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?emp a nw:Employee ; nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?emp nw:reportsTo ?mgr . } }

question: Which territories have no employees assigned to them?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?terrDesc WHERE { ?terr a nw:Territory ; nw:territoryDescription ?terrDesc . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?emp nw:servesTerritory ?terr . } }

question: Which products need reordering (units in stock below reorder level and not discontinued)?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT ?prodName ?stock ?reorder WHERE { ?product a nw:Product ; nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:unitsInStock ?stock ; nw:reorderLevel ?reorder ; nw:discontinued "false"^^xsd:boolean . FILTER(?stock < ?reorder) }

question: Are there any orders that have no order lines?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?orderID WHERE { ?order a nw:Order ; nw:orderID ?orderID . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?order nw:hasOrderLine ?ol . } }

question: Are there any order lines where the discount is outside the valid range of 0 to 1?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?ol ?disc WHERE { ?ol a nw:OrderLine ; nw:discount ?disc . FILTER(?disc < 0 || ?disc > 1) }

question: Which employees report to themselves (violating the irreflexive constraint on reportsTo)?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> SELECT ?fn ?ln WHERE { ?emp a nw:Employee ; nw:firstName ?fn ; nw:lastName ?ln ; nw:reportsTo ?emp . }

question: Are there any products that are discontinued but still appear in orders with a shipped date after their discontinuation?
gold_sparql: PREFIX nw: <http://example.org/northwind#> PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?prodName ?orderID WHERE { ?ol nw:includesProduct ?prod ; nw:belongsToOrder ?order . ?prod nw:productName ?prodName ; nw:discontinued "true"^^xsd:boolean . ?order nw:orderID ?orderID . }
